extra.reason: Added host-based BringrTests XCTest target with passing sample test, wired into scheme; installed SwiftLint + .swiftlint.yml; documented quality gates in README. All three gates pass.

Accessibility permission bootstrap: PermissionsManager (injectable probe/prompt/openSettings), AppDelegate launch check+prompt+monitoring (distributed notification + 1s poll), Preferences window with status + Re-check + Open Settings, menu warning when untrusted. 7 unit tests; build/lint/test pass.

Window control primitives: raise/focus, hide-others-apps, hide-others-windows, capture-once baseline + restore-to-baseline. Behind WindowControlling seam; orchestration covered by 7 fake-backed tests. All gates pass.

Window enumeration service: WindowEnumerator over WindowEnumerationSource seam (CGWindowSource live), groups normal on-screen windows by app with stable kCGWindowNumber ids; 10 fixture tests; all 3 gates pass

Added nestable MenuNode tree with static/dynamic child providers, MenuAction, MenuTrigger, MenuRegistry (no singletons), and WindowSwitcherMenu building the apps→windows tree from the enumerator. 9 unit tests, all gates pass.

Ported ClipSlop's permission alert as a single-permission (Accessibility-only) launch modal: floating NSWindow + SwiftUI view with Grant/Open-Settings actions, numbered re-grant steps, moveAside on prompt, and live auto-dismiss via PermissionsManager.isTrusted. Gated by shouldPresentPermissionAlert + suppress toggle. Build/lint/39 tests pass; modal confirmed showing at launch via CGWindowList.

Pre-warmed borderless/transparent/floating non-activating overlay panel + RadialLayout geometry (even slices, hit-testing, cursor placement) + RadialMenuView placeholder rendering; wired into AppDelegate pre-warm and a menu-bar summon. 14 new unit tests; verified visible overlay appears at 320x320 floating, centered at cursor.

US-007: global left+right mouse-chord activation. Pure MouseChordDetector (configurable threshold, defers first press to prevent leak) + live MouseChordMonitor CGEventTap; summons radial menu. 15 unit tests; all gates pass.

Implemented hold-to-select and click-to-stay interaction modes via a pure unit-tested InteractionStateMachine, persisted mode setting in Preferences, and wiring into the radial controller + chord monitor

App-hover isolates the app (hide-others reveal) and opens a concentric windows sub-wheel via a testable RadialNavigator; re-target rebuilds from the live tree, move-out restores. 10 new tests; all gates green.

Window-hover isolates a single window: navigator level-1 hover hides the app's other windows via WindowController.hideOtherWindows; re-isolates between slices; restoreWindows(of:) un-minimizes on leaving the window ring while keeping the app isolated. Reconciled the US-003/US-004 WindowID token schemes (LiveWindowSystem now keys on kCGWindowNumber via _AXUIElementGetWindow). Build/lint/107 tests pass.
US-008: three-finger trackpad press activation — pure ThreeFingerPressDetector + live MultitouchSupport monitor (dlopen, graceful degrade), wired into AppDelegate; 12 tests; all gates pass

Finalized US-012: commit raises/focuses chosen window, restores all others, remembers selection per app, and pre-highlights it on next summon. Removed stale refactor markers; added 13 unit tests (navigator commit/prehighlight + WindowController.commit primitive) in new RadialNavigatorCommitTests.swift. Build, swiftlint --strict, and 144 tests all pass.

Wired Esc, click-outside, and trigger-loss (active-Space change) cancel paths into the existing cancel->restore funnel, and added a UserDefaults-backed reveal journal (RevealStateStore) with a restore-on-launch safety net so a crash mid-reveal never strands a hidden window. 156 tests pass, lint clean, build & run verified.
Appearance customization: size/radius, slice fill opacity, label visibility in Preferences; read fresh per summon, resize reused overlay, single geometry drives render+hit-test

Fixed commit not raising/focusing: commit no longer re-activates prior frontmost (race), re-enumerates target app to refresh AX cache, and LiveWindowSystem.activate sets kAXFrontmost for reliable cross-app activation on macOS 14+. Added regression test asserting commit activation/enumeration ordering.

Gated three-finger press on a real physical trackpad click (NSEvent leftMouseDown) while exactly three fingers are present, so taps/rests no longer summon; finger-lift release for hold-to-select preserved.
Implemented selected-window focus stabilization and verified tests/build/launch

Hover now driven by both a global and a local NSEvent monitor (via injectable EventMonitorInstaller), plus acceptsMouseMovedEvents on the overlay, so app/window isolation works in click-to-stay as well as hold-to-select. New RadialMenuControllerHoverTests asserts both monitors are wired in both modes.
Adjusted commit focus to AutoRaise-style AX raise before app activation, strengthened app activation, and verified lint/tests/build/launch

Added Launch at login toggle to Preferences backed by SMAppService.mainApp (direct, not the SPM package — agent can't drive Xcode's package GUI and keeps build network-free). New injectable LaunchAtLoginManager + 7 unit tests; build/lint/184 tests green.

Implemented app-slice commit so releasing on the first-level app circle restores reveal state and activates/focuses the selected app's current front window; added regression coverage and verified lint/tests/build/run.

Reveal-strategy setting: RevealStrategy enum (raise-to-front/hide-others/dim-others, default hide-others) persisted via @AppStorage + read per-summon; WindowController dispatches each strategy at both app- and window-hover levels; dim implemented as a spotlight overlay (LiveDimmer/Dimming seam) with window cutouts. Preferences picker added. Build+lint clean, 200 tests pass (16 new).

Detect the three-finger click via an active CGEventTap (created after the chord tap so it sits at the head) that swallows the click and its matching up, so it no longer leaks to the app behind the menu. Passive monitor kept as a permission-free fallback. WindowServer swipe gestures (Mission Control) are not userspace-suppressible but require a swipe not a click, so they don't conflict — documented.
Wrapped Preferences content in a ScrollView with a fixed 460x600 window; DRY'd repeated header/divider into a section() helper so settings scroll instead of stretching the window taller

Window-level 'hide others' now parks siblings off-screen (instant) instead of AX-minimizing them (slow genie animation). Captures each window's pre-summon position; restore/commit/crash-safety-net move them back exactly. App-level hide unchanged.

Implemented US-016: per-slice arc table in RadialLayout with windowRing factory (app-aligned arcs, overflow fisheye, single-app fallback); RadialRing carries a shared layout; navigator tracks focusedWindowIndex and empty-sector no-op. Build/lint/224 tests pass.

Window-level hide-others now captures and restores each parked window's size, not just its position. macOS clamps a window's height when it's moved off-screen (NSWindow title-bar constraint), so restoring position alone left windows shorter. Fix threads originalSize through WindowSnapshot, restoreWindowBaseline, restoreCapturedFrame, and the crash-recovery snapshot.

Park hidden windows off-screen on X only (offScreenPoint y now on-screen at 100) so macOS never clamps the height off the bottom — eliminates the setPosition/setSize restore race that made height restore ~50/50. Size capture/restore kept as a safety net.

Window sub-wheel no longer sticks empty: the default hide-others reveal calls async unhide on re-target, so the immediate CGWindowList scan could miss the just-unhidden app's windows. expandApp now retries an empty sub-wheel instead of latching expandedAppIndex (hasWindowSubWheel guard), and the controller re-pokes the hover briefly so it heals even with a still cursor.

Added App + Window sort-order Preferences. Apps: 'Recently used (Cmd-Tab order)' default = front-to-back z-order grouping (the faithful Cmd-Tab approximation, laid out from 12 o'clock clockwise) + 'By name (A-Z)' for a stable spot. Windows: 'Recently used' default = front-to-back + 'Fixed position' = ascending kCGWindowNumber (creation order). Both orderings come only from what macOS reports (window z-order, app name, window number) — no event tracking/remembered positions. Read fresh each summon in WindowEnumerator via injectable providers. Note: today's order already equaled the Cmd-Tab/z-order approximation, so it became the default; the second app option is alphabetical (no public API exposes the literal switcher order without activation tracking, which was disallowed). Build/lint/240 tests green.

Replaced the unreliable three-finger trackpad press with configurable modifier-key activation. New Mouse + Trackpad Preferences sections after Accessibility: trackpad = modifier-hold only (default Fn), mouse = modifier-hold OR left+right click (default left+right). Added ModifierCombination OptionSet, MouseActivationMethod, persistence, pure ModifierHoldDetector + live CGEventTap monitor; gated the mouse chord on the method; deleted ThreeFingerActivation. 27 new tests, 244 total pass, build + swiftlint --strict clean.

Rewrote README from the stale 'early scaffold' description to document v1's actual features: activation (mouse chord + modifier-hold, trackpad Fn), the apps→windows interaction, all Preferences (permissions, mouse, trackpad, startup, interaction, reveal, sorting, appearance) with defaults, Accessibility permission, macOS 14+, corrected previews→placeholders, and updated build/run commands.

Pie menu now scopes to the display under the cursor: WindowEnumerator.enumerate(onScreen:) filters windows by centre-in-display-bounds (CG space), threaded from summon through makeMenu/makeRoot so both the apps ring and windows sub-wheel lock to the summon screen; ScreenLocator resolves the display from the cursor.

Added CuratedApp model (bundle-id keyed, Codable, cached name) + CuratedApps persistence namespace (JSON under myApps.list, current(from:) returns empty when unset) + bundle-id resolution helpers (bundle URL, running app, pid). 11 tests; build/lint/tests green.

Added My Apps section to Preferences: bordered List of icon+name rows (NSWorkspace.icon(forFile:)), add via NSOpenPanel (.application, /Applications) and Finder/Dock drag (dropDestination), remove via minus on selection, drag-reorder via onMove; all persisted through CuratedApps under the wheel's key. Extracted to MyAppsEditor.swift for file_length. Build/lint/tests green (268).

Added optional bundleIdentifier + representsApp to MenuNode (additive, alongside representedApp); RadialMenuView now resolves an app slice's icon by running pid first (unchanged) then falls back to NSWorkspace.icon(forFile: bundleURL.path) via CuratedApp.bundleURL for not-running curated apps. +5 tests; build/lint/273 tests green.

Added MenuAction.launchApp(bundleIdentifier:), the AppLaunching seam + LiveAppLauncher (NSWorkspace.openApplication), and the RadialNavigator commitApp launch branch (restores reveal then launches); 3 unit tests via FakeAppLauncher. Build/lint/276 tests green.

Added MyAppsMenu composition layer: top-level ring built from the curated list (running-with-windows apps get the expand-to-windows node, not-running/window-less get a launch node), pinned in user order; empty list falls through to the raw WindowSwitcherMenu. Wired into AppDelegate. 5 unit tests, all gates pass.
Show-all-other-running-apps toggle: persisted setting (default ON), wheel-composition append of non-curated screen-scoped running apps after the curated block, and Preferences toggle. 288 tests pass.
Added 'Don't sort my pinned apps' checkbox (default ON) to Sorting; when off, AppSortOrder reorders the curated block too via MyAppsMenu.ordered. Persisted as myApps.doNotSort. +8 tests.

Recent-use order now driven by a persisted RecencyTracker observed only at clean summon time (pre-reveal), never during hover, so previewing no longer reshuffles the .recentlyUsed app/window order between summons; the true frontmost app/window at each summon (incl. a prior commit) still advances it.

Dock icon now appears via .regular activation policy while Preferences is open and reverts to .accessory on close; reference-counted DockIconManager with injected policy seam + 6 unit tests; verified end-to-end via menu-bar drive + Dock inspection.

Already implemented in a prior iteration; verified CuratedApp model + CuratedApps persistence (current/save/defaultsKey mirroring RevealStrategy) and bundle-id resolution helpers. Build, SwiftLint --strict (0), and full XCTest suite all pass.

Optional second-level cursor lock: navigator owns pure engage/release + confinement-region policy (unit-tested); controller warps the pointer back to the last in-region anchor when a move would leave the open app's sub-wheel and its parent arc. Off by default, toggle in Preferences > Interaction. Build/lint/tests green.

Added 'Leave only my selection on screen' Preferences toggle (HideOnCommit, off by default). When on, commit hides every other app (Cmd-H) and minimizes the target app's other windows; app-level commit reduces to the app's front window. Read fresh per summon via controller→navigator→WindowController. 10 new tests; build/lint/tests green.

Added Preferences 'Screens & Spaces' section: four independent toggles (apps {all screens, all Spaces}, windows {all screens, all Spaces}) resolved per-level into CollectionScope and threaded through makeRoot(appsScope:windowsScope:); screens via existing CGRect filter, Spaces via dropping .optionOnScreenOnly in the source. Defaults preserve current screen/Space scoping. Build, SwiftLint --strict (0), 350 tests all pass.

Added global 'include minimized windows' and 'include hidden windows' collection settings; broadened query classifies offscreen windows (off-Space/minimized/hidden) via AX+NSRunningApplication and a precedence keep-rule, decoupling minimized from the all-Spaces query.

Phantom windows from the all-Spaces/all-screens broadened query were CG records with no matching AX window (Chrome/Ghostty background surfaces) — non-focusable, so committing them just activated the app's main window. Fixed by stamping each broadened record isAXBacked (its number is in the app's AX window list) and dropping off-screen records that aren't AX-backed in WindowEnumerator.shouldCollect. On-screen windows always kept.

Filter window collection to ordinary Dock apps (activationPolicy == .regular) so broadening to all Spaces/screens no longer floods the ring with background/agent/menu-bar apps. CGWindowSource stamps RawWindow.isDockApp from runningApps() on both narrow and broadened paths; WindowEnumerator.shouldCollect drops non-Dock apps first. Extracted CGWindowSource to its own file for length headroom.

Reworked the broadened collection path for performance: per-summon broadened-raw cache in WindowEnumerator (classify runs once per summon, not per hover) + classify only AX-probes apps with off-screen records (on-screen-only apps cost zero AX). Narrow default path untouched. Build/lint/365 tests green.

hideOnCommit now only hides OTHER apps; it never minimizes the selected app's own windows. Both window- and app-level commits keep all of the chosen app's windows on screen and simply activate the picked/front window.

Added .dockPosition app sort (orders the pie to match the Dock) + 'Keep Finder last' toggle shown only for that mode. Live Dock order read from com.apple.dock persistent-apps (Finder prepended); pure generic DockOrder.sorted reused by WindowEnumerator and MyAppsMenu.
Override NSPanel constrainFrameRect to stop the default screen-top clamp shoving the cursor-centred overlay down near the top edge (X was never clamped, hence Y-only)

Added a configurable hold-delay (slider + numeric ms field, default 100ms) for modifier-key activation in both Mouse and Trackpad. Pure ModifierHoldDelayGate gates the press edge behind a Timer in ModifierHoldMonitor; a too-short hold cancels, a hold past the delay summons. Build/lint/389 tests green.

Added app exclusion ('Excluded Apps') list: comma-separated bundle-id/name entries + running/installed app picker; AppIgnoreList stamps RawWindow.isIgnored in CGWindowSource, dropped first in WindowEnumerator.shouldCollect and filtered from MyAppsMenu curated block. Build/lint/409 tests green.

Added 'Distance from center' appearance setting: an inner-radius padding folded into RadialAppearance.geometry that slides the whole pie out from the summon point at constant ring thickness, widening each slice's outer arc for easier aiming. Default 0 (no-op), range 0...150, clamped on read; new Preferences slider; 5 unit tests. Build/lint/414 tests pass.

Root cause: kAXWindowsAttribute only enumerates the current Space, so the Bringr-93j.52 isAXBacked phantom filter dropped genuine other-Space windows. Fix: discriminate real vs phantom off-screen windows via managed-Space membership (CGSCopySpacesForWindows) instead of AX-list — verified to cleanly separate them — plus cross-Space focus on commit via the SLPS recipe (scoped to not-in-AX-list windows). New SpaceSupport.swift isolates all private CGS/SkyLight calls; pure keep-rule + commit decision unit-tested (+5). Build/lint/tests green. NOTE: live two-Space behaviour couldn't be verified in the agent env (can't create a Space) — needs a manual two-Space check.

Added optional trackpad haptic-on-hover: TrackpadHaptics setting (toggle + Light/Medium/Strong intensity), pure HoverHapticTrigger transition rule, HapticController per-summon policy (suppressed when an external mouse is connected), LiveHapticPerformer (NSHapticFeedbackManager) and IOKit ExternalMouseDetector shells. Wired into RadialMenuController hover path; Preferences Trackpad section. 11 new tests; build/lint/tests green.

Within-app window stacking is already restored on commit (restoreWindowBaseline's reversed re-raise); added a raise-to-front commit regression test locking that in. Cross-app stacking on commit is intentionally left intact: re-activating other apps would reintroduce the Bringr-93j.18 async-activation race that buries the chosen window — the exact risk the bead notes said to avoid.

Windowless running apps now reopen a window on select. Curated .launchApp slices and WindowController.commit(app) post the Dock's kAEReopenApplication event (AppReopen.send) instead of bare activate, so a windowless app (e.g. Calendar) gets a fresh window. Added reopen to the WindowControlling seam + 2 tests. Build/lint/433 tests green.

Redesigned pie menu to macOS Liquid Glass: per-slice glassEffect base, dropped blue accent fill for neutral white emphasis, adaptive .primary rims, higher-contrast .primary labels. RadialMenuView.swift only; model/geometry untouched. Build+swiftlint --strict+433 tests pass.

All-screens listed phantom backing surfaces as windows because the keep-rule trusted every CoreGraphics on-screen record; with the screen filter dropped (all screens), nothing culled the off-display phantom surfaces Chrome/Ghostty keep. Fix: when spanning all screens, validate on-screen records by managed-Space membership (real windows are on a managed Space, phantoms are not) — the same cheap signal already used for off-screen cross-Space windows. Added rich per-window collection logging (number/pid/on/managed/ax/min/hidden/dock/size/reason) at debug for diagnosability. Build/lint/439 tests green.

Reworked Liquid Glass pie menu into 3 strict z-layers: single unioned glass shape per ring (kills GlassEffectContainer merge / detached-wedge artifact), per-slice emphasis above glass, sharp icons+labels on top (no longer refracted). Build/lint/439 tests green.

Liquid Glass follow-up: fixed hover-shift by collapsing per-ring glass into ONE glass element (RadialGlassShape unions all rings, pinned to fixed frame — GlassEffectContainer re-anchors its merged capsule when a child is added, which was the jump); lowered default fill (0.18->0.1) and widened opacity range (0.05-0.6 -> 0-1) so genuine .regular glass reads at rest and the slider visibly frosts the arc; improved pre-macOS-26 fallback to .ultraThinMaterial + top-down sheen in the same single shape. Build/lint/439 tests green.

Added an Appearance 'Liquid Glass effect' checkbox (RadialAppearance.usesLiquidGlass, default on); when off the wheel uses the .ultraThinMaterial fallback even on macOS 26, doubling as a fallback preview. Extracted appearance settings into AppearanceSettingsView.swift to stay under the 400-line lint limit.

Added Appearance glass-shadow and text/icon-shadow opacity sliders plus numeric input fields for all appearance sliders (reusable LabeledSlider); model/rendering wiring pre-existed, added Preferences UI + model tests. Build, swiftlint --strict, 442 tests all green.
Mouse activation is now two independent toggles (left+right click + modifier keys) instead of an either/or radio; either, both, or neither can be active.
No longer needed — the main-thread-blocking lag from minimized/hidden window collection has already been fixed.

Windows sub-wheel reused the apps-ring's per-summon broadened scan instead of re-running the AX classify on every first hover. Root cause: the broadenedRawCache was keyed strictly by validatesOnscreen, so the validated all-screens apps scan never served the unvalidated screen-scoped sub-wheel; that re-run AX copyWindows hung ~1-2s while the reveal's activate() foreground transition was in flight (Preferences open makes Bringr .regular+active). Fix: a validated cache (a strict superset) now also serves an unvalidated read; the reverse stays unsafe. Verified via os_log timing: sub-wheel build dropped from ~1600ms to ~5ms.

Replaced Mouse+Trackpad activation sections with Mouse (left+right click) + Keyboard (unified modifier hold + delay + laptop note). Collapsed the duplicate mouse/trackpad modifier keys into one keyboard.modifiers key; relocated trackpad haptics to its own Haptics section.

Implemented optional keyboard navigation: arrow keys, number keys (1-9,0), optional Enter-to-confirm, level-aware Escape; keyboard focus reuses the hover preview machinery with an accent tint; keys captured via a consuming keyDown CGEventTap. 33 unit tests, build + lint --strict + tests all green.

Activation settings reorganized into Mouse + Keyboard sections; trackpad activation section removed and the duplicated modifier-key picker (plus the 93j.58 hold delay) unified under Keyboard with the laptop-only note. Verified already-present implementation: build + swiftlint --strict (0 violations) + 474 tests all pass.

Reversed Up/Down (Up drills into windows, Down returns to apps); added confirm keys in confirmation mode (Space + same-number + arrow now commit an armed target, via navigator pendingConfirmation); verified apps-ring keyboard focus renders identically to windows (RadialRingEmphasis applies the accent uniformly per ring). 482 tests pass, swiftlint --strict clean.

Verify-only: full audit confirms every setting persists. All ~34 settings are single-UserDefaults-key (@AppStorage/CuratedApps.save) with reader defaults referencing the same model constant as the view (no drift); launch-at-login is SMAppService-persisted. No in-memory-only setting, no key collisions, AppDelegate only reads at launch. Gates: build OK, swiftlint --strict 0, 482 tests pass. Runtime: user's non-default values (revealStrategy=raiseToFront, sortOrder.apps=dockPosition) survive launch unchanged.

Added 3 keyboard-nav options: close-on-unsupported-key (default ON), focus the app's active window on drill-in, and opt-in commit of a number-jumped multi-window app on release/confirm without a window pick.

Commented out both 'all Spaces' collection checkboxes (UI only; CollectionScope/CollectionPreferences plumbing left intact for future use) and added a shared-Spaces note to the 'all screens' option explaining it needs 'Displays have separate Spaces' OFF. Build/lint/494 tests pass.
